temporal_description: A man in a white, long-sleeved shirt and dark trousers is shown from behind, standing on what appears to be a balcony at night. He is reaching out with his right hand towards a vertical pole wrapped in clear plastic. The background is dimly lit, showing the facade of another building across from him. A dark railing is visible in the foreground. In the top left corner, there is a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网". The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the man. The audio opens with a low, suspenseful, and slightly ominous musical score, creating a tense and serious atmosphere. The man in the white shirt turns slightly as another man, dressed in a dark suit, enters the frame from the right. The man in the suit reaches out and gently touches the shoulder of the man in the white shirt. A man speaks in a calm and polite tone, saying, "不好意思啊" (Bùhǎoyìsi a), which translates to "Excuse me." His voice is steady and carries a sense of quiet apology or interruption. The camera angle is still from behind the man in the white shirt, now showing both men from the back. The man in the suit appears to be speaking to him. The watermark remains in the top left corner. The camera is static.
